content.body:
Good morning, spec fans.  Please take 30 seconds to fill in this interest survey for September 2026 meeting in Tokyo 🇯🇵

- [**September 2026 Plenary - Interest to Attend In-Person**](https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/585)

Sony Interactive Entertainment will be hosting in the same location as 2024.  You feedback is requested by Wednesday 1st July 2026.
